response:
## Perspective Audit Summary

**Component/artifact reviewed:** AddressAutocomplete.jsx
**Perspectives escalated for deep review:** Keyboard Motor (HIGH), Screen Reader Semantic (MEDIUM), Cognitive Neurodivergent (HIGH)
**Perspectives at LOW (not reviewed):** Magnification Reflow, Environmental Contrast, Vestibular Motion, Auditory Access

### Findings by Severity

| Severity | Count |
|---|---|
| MAJOR | 6 |
| MINOR | 1 |
| ENHANCEMENT | 1 |

### Perspectives That Passed

None of the three escalated perspectives passed all checklist items.

### Perspectives With Findings — Grouped by ARRM Role

**Front-End Dev**
- [Enter key selects suggestion AND submits form] — Keyboard Motor — MAJOR — 3.2.2 On Input
- [No role="listbox" for suggestions container] — Screen Reader Semantic — MAJOR — 4.1.2 Name, Role, Value
- [No role="option" for suggestion items] — Screen Reader Semantic — MAJOR — 4.1.2 Name, Role, Value
- [Loading spinner has no aria-busy or text] — Screen Reader Semantic — MAJOR — 4.1.3 Status Messages
- [Suggestions disappear after 800ms timeout without warning] — Cognitive Neurodivergent — MAJOR — 2.2.1 Timing Adjustable
- [No focus-visible on suggestion items] — Keyboard Motor — MINOR — 2.4.7 Focus Visible

**UX Design**
- [Suggestions disappear after 800ms timeout without warning] — Cognitive Neurodivergent — MAJOR — 2.2.1 Timing Adjustable

**Content Author**
- ["No results" message has low contrast (3.5:1)] — Environmental Contrast — MINOR — 1.4.3 Contrast Minimum

### Open Questions Requiring Human Verification

None in this code review.

### Recommended Next Step

**REVISE** (MAJOR findings present — address before shipping)

---

## Detailed Findings

```
**Finding:** Enter key selects suggestion AND submits form — violates WCAG 3.2.2 On Input
**WCAG:** 3.2.2 On Input
**Perspective:** Keyboard Motor
**Severity:** MAJOR
**Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: UX Design)
**Evidence:** Line 34: `formRef.current.submit()` called immediately after selecting suggestion
**Fix:** Separate selection from form submission. Add confirmation step or make Enter only select suggestion.

**Finding:** Suggestions container has no role="listbox"
**WCAG:** 4.1.2 Name, Role, Value
**Perspective:** Screen Reader Semantic
**Severity:** MAJOR
**Route to:** Front-End Dev
**Evidence:** Line 67: `<div class="suggestions-list">` with no ARIA role
**Fix:** Add `role="listbox"` and `aria-activedescendant` to container

**Finding:** Suggestion items have no role="option"
**WCAG:** 4.1.2 Name, Role, Value
**Perspective:** Screen Reader Semantic
**Severity:** MAJOR
**Route to:** Front-End Dev
**Evidence:** Line 73: `<div class="suggestion-item">` with no ARIA role
**Fix:** Add `role="option"` to each suggestion item

**Finding:** Loading spinner has no aria-busy or text
**WCAG:** 4.1.3 Status Messages
**Perspective:** Screen Reader Semantic
**Severity:** MAJOR
**Route to:** Front-End Dev
**Evidence:** Line 81: `<div class="autocomplete-spinner">` with no ARIA
**Fix:** Add `role="status"` and `aria-live="polite"`

**Finding:** Suggestions disappear after 800ms timeout without warning
**WCAG:** 2.2.1 Timing Adjustable
**Perspective:** Cognitive Neurodivergent
**Severity:** MAJOR
**Route to:** UX Design (secondary: Front-End Dev)
**Evidence:** Line 21: `setTimeout` hides suggestions after 800ms
**Fix:** Add warning before timeout and allow user to extend time

**Finding:** No focus-visible on suggestion items
**WCAG:** 2.4.7 Focus Visible
**Perspective:** Keyboard Motor
**Severity:** MINOR
**Route to:** Front-End Dev
**Evidence:** Suggestion items are not focusable (only highlighted visually)
**Fix:** Make items focusable with `tabIndex` and add visible focus style

**Finding:** "No results" message has low contrast (3.5:1)
**WCAG:** 1.4.3 Contrast Minimum
**Perspective:** Environmental Contrast
**Severity:** MINOR
**Route to:** Visual Design (secondary: Front-End Dev)
**Evidence:** Line 113: `.no-results` color #888 on white
**Fix:** Increase contrast to 4.5:1 for text elements

**Finding:** Missing autocomplete attribute on input field
**WCAG:** 1.3.5 Identify Input Purpose
**Perspective:** Cognitive Neurodivergent
**Severity:** ENHANCEMENT
**Route to:** Front-End Dev
**Evidence:** Line 49: `autoComplete="off"` on address input
**Fix:** Add `autocomplete="street-address"` to enable browser autofill
```

---

perspective_alarms: keyboard_motor=HIGH, screen_reader_semantic=MEDIUM, cognitive_neurodivergent=HIGH

reproduction_steps: Type in address field, select suggestion with arrow keys, press Enter
expected_behavior: Enter should only select suggestion
actual_behavior: Enter selects suggestion AND submits form
trend: new

evidence: Line 21: setTimeout hides suggestions after 800ms
reproduction_steps: Type slowly in address field

actual_behavior: Suggestions disappear after 800ms without warning
